cases.prompt: Review web-ux-test/plan.yaml and tell me whether it is safe to run against staging with Playwright MCP.
cases.expected_output: A prioritized review covering schema validity, auth/session safety, destructive action limits, scenario quality, evidence, and MCP execution readiness.
assertions: Runs or recommends the validate-plan script when a file exists.
Leads with critical safety or execution blockers.

cases.prompt: Audit this YAML test plan for missing accessibility, network, console, responsive, and error-state coverage.
cases.expected_output: A coverage-focused plan review with concrete missing scenarios and suggested regression candidates.
assertions: Checks accessibility and ARIA snapshot quality when relevant.
Flags vague checks and missing evidence.

cases.prompt: Generate a full new plan from only this app description.
cases.expected_output: The skill should not trigger unless the user asks for a revised replacement after review; plan creation belongs to generate-web-ux-test-plan.
assertions: Does not use this skill for greenfield plan generation.
